title: Auto Smelt 2
description: This data pack can automatically consume coal from the player's inventory to smelt items.
body:
This data pack can automatically consume the items in your inventory that can be smelted with coal.

- Usable fuels include: [Coal](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/w/%E7%85%A4%E7%82%AD "Coal"), [Charcoal](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/w/%E6%9C%A8%E7%82%AD "Charcoal"), [Coal Block](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/w/%E7%85%A4%E7%82%AD%E5%9D%97 "Coal Block")
- Items that can be smelted include: [Ores](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/w/%E7%83%A7%E7%82%BC#%E7%9F%BF%E7%9F%B3), [Food](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/w/%E7%83%A7%E7%82%BC#%E9%A3%9F%E7%89%A9)

## Features:
- Smelting one item will consume 1 experience point. If the player has no experience, the item will not be smelted.
- Enter `/trigger ore` to turn on or off the smelting of ore blocks (off by default).
- If all three supported fuels are in the inventory at the same time, these fuels will be consumed simultaneously.
- After consuming a coal block, 9 items can be smelted simultaneously, and 9 experience points will be deducted.

If you encounter any problems, please click [here](https://github.com/WhiteElephant-abc/auto-smelt/issues/new) to report.

**This data pack depends on [DFL](https://github.com/WhiteElephant-abc/datapackets-functions-LIB)** 

**This data pack has nothing to do with [Auto Smelt](https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-smelt).**
